svg.text: Personal Assistance Ecosystem · One Tracker, Six Discipline Agents
life.pa.* · Chief of Staff + Wise Counsel
Routes all cross-domain queries · Knows your whole life, not just one domain
↔ cross-agent signals (consolation/desolation · wellness · financial runway · home accessibility · relationship health)
Read · Write · Append · Register Document · Get Action Items — no agent touches the filesystem directly
Twilio · Flask · CrewAI · LangGraph · auth · LLM routing
Data Repositories · Private Git · All records local / on-premises
lifeTracker · pyTrackers ecosystem · Frank Rojas · June 2026 · v1.3
"Your wisest counselor, always available — chief of staff and trusted friend."
